policy.rule: Declare A -> B only when A changes B's behavior or result.
policy.coverage: Every source-state by relevant target-state case must be present. Use pairwise coverage across independent sources and full Cartesian coverage only for compound branches.

interactions.description: The active custom profile determines which profile receives saved Settings changes.

cases.expected_result: Only the first profile changes and reloads.
Only the second profile changes and reloads.

interactions.description: Settings search controls which navigation destinations remain available.

cases.expected_result: Only Advanced remains visible.
No page remains visible and no unrelated page is selected as a result.
All eight navigation destinations return.

interactions.description: Cancel must prevent the Settings save behavior in both clean and dirty states.

cases.expected_result: The settings file is byte-for-byte unchanged.
The edited value was not serialized and the old value reloads.

interactions.description: The selected Theme mode changes what Settings saves and the application applies.

cases.expected_result: System persists, applies, and reloads.
Light persists, applies, and reloads.
Dark persists, applies, and reloads.

interactions.description: The configured zero/positive timeout changes whether auto-close occurs.

cases.expected_result: The timer cancels the picker once.
The picker stays visible until a manual action.

interactions.description: The automatic-speech setting changes whether a completed model reply enters TTS playback.

cases.expected_result: No reply synthesis or playback occurs; manual read-aloud remains usable.
Stable reply segments synthesize and play in order.

interactions.description: Transcript-review mode changes whether voice input pauses in the picker before querying.

cases.expected_result: The picker opens and no query is sent until the reviewed transcript is accepted.
The transcript is queried immediately and the reply is stored.

interactions.description: Every local-file access mode changes the availability of every local-file tool.

cases.expected_result: Not granted.
Not granted.
Not granted.
Not granted.
Not granted.
Granted and executable.
Granted and executable.
Not granted.
Not granted.
Not granted.
Granted and executable.
Granted and executable.
Granted; mutation requires the approval path.
Granted; mutation requires the approval path.
Granted; mutation requires the approval path.
Granted and executable.
Granted and executable.
Granted and executes without an approval prompt.
Granted and executes without an approval prompt.
Granted and executes without an approval prompt.

interactions.description: The active Dark theme determines which saved custom palette is applied to the running application.

cases.expected_result: The compact profile palette persists and its background is present in the live application stylesheet.
The roomy profile palette persists and its background is present in the live application stylesheet.
The scroll profile palette persists and its background is present in the live application stylesheet.
The snap profile palette persists and its background is present in the live application stylesheet.

interactions.description: The saved icon-size value changes both dimensions of the already-running floating icon.

cases.expected_result: The visible icon resizes to 48 x 48 without restarting.
The visible icon resizes to 64 x 64 without restarting.
The visible icon resizes to 72 x 72 without restarting.
The visible icon resizes to 96 x 96 without restarting.

interactions.description: Compound bubble appearance and timing states must all survive Save and update the existing bubble together.

cases.expected_result: Compact geometry, colors, low timing values, and both disabled flags persist and apply live.
Roomy geometry, colors, high timing values, disabled scrolling, and enabled snap persist and apply live.
Midrange geometry, colors, enabled scrolling, and disabled snap persist and apply live.
Large geometry, colors, enabled scrolling, and enabled snap persist and apply live.

interactions.description: Selecting the built-in profile changes the model routes and profile identity that Save persists and reloads.

cases.expected_result: Low setup persists on the default runtime profile and all three routes reopen on ChatGPT gpt-5.5.

interactions.description: The clean or dirty Settings state determines whether guided profile setup may open.

cases.expected_result: The real guided profile wizard opens and is usable.
The wizard stays closed and Settings asks the user to save or discard first.

interactions.description: The selected Settings page determines the exact state Reset Page is allowed to remove.

cases.expected_result: App state resets while every other page sentinel survives.
Connection state resets while every other page sentinel survives.
Model-routing state resets while every other page sentinel survives.
Voice/audio state resets and the STT refresh path runs while every other page sentinel survives.
Shortcut state resets while every other page sentinel survives.
Prompt state resets while every other page sentinel survives.
Advanced state resets while every other page sentinel survives.
The no-setting About branch succeeds without removing any other page sentinel.
